001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
004import java.util.Collection;
005import java.util.List;
006import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
007
008/**
009 * Spring Data repository for {@link IssueType} persistence operations.
010 */
011public interface IssueTypeRepository extends JpaRepository<IssueType, Long> {
012
013  /**
014   * Finds all issue types matching the provided tags.
015   *
016   * @param issueTypeTags issue type tags.
017   * @return matching issue types.
018   */
019  List<IssueType> findAllByIssueTypeTagIn(Collection<String> issueTypeTags);
020
021  /**
022   * Finds an issue type by tag.
023   *
024   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
025   * @return issue type, or {@code null} if not found.
026   */
027  IssueType findByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag);
028
029  /**
030   * Deletes an issue type by tag.
031   *
032   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
033   */
034  void deleteIssueTypeByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag);
035
036  /**
037   * Returns whether an issue type exists with the provided tag.
038   *
039   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
040   * @return {@code true} if a matching issue type exists; {@code false} otherwise.
041   */
042  boolean existsByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag);
043}
